nasb.text: Immediately one of them ran, and taking a sponge, he filled it with sour wine and put it on a reed, and gave Him a drink.

esv.text: And one of them at once ran and took a sponge, filled it with sour wine, and put it on a reed and gave it to him to drink.

cnv.text: 有一個人馬上跑去拿海綿蘸滿了酸酒，用蘆葦遞給他喝。

ccb.text: 其中一人连忙跑去拿了一块海绵，蘸满酸酒，绑在苇秆上送给祂喝。

csbs.text: 其中有一个人立刻跑去，拿了海绵蘸满了酸酒，套在芦苇上，要给他喝。
